name: Incident Response Plan GDPR Addendum
description: Ensures incident response plan includes GDPR breach notification procedures
query: SELECT id, policy_type, status, last_approved_date FROM policy_documents WHERE policy_type = 'incident_response_gdpr' AND (status != 'approved' OR last_approved_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Add GDPR breach notification procedures to incident response plan. Include 72-hour notification requirement.
